title: Local gamers geared up for SA Catan National League
description: GEORGE NEWS - The George Gaming Group (GGG)...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The George Gaming Group (GGG) proudly supports the Catan National League, organised by Unplug Yourself, as it comes to our area again this year with more fun and games.

As the only Catan National League event in the Southern Cape, this tournament attracts players from all over the Garden Route and surrounding districts.


> The league consists of seven events on Saturdays, with the first on 5 April. Players with limited experience can gain valuable game time, improving their skills as they compete. Last year, six GGG members joined the Southern Cape finals.


The top 60 participants in the country will be invited to the national finals, with the top five performers receiving flights to the host city.

For more information, contact Cal on 067 397 2173.

Event details

When: Saturdays (5 and 12 April; 3, 10 and 31 May; 14 and 28 June)

Where: Bains Bench & Eatery, R404, Blanco, George

Time: 10:00 (registration starts at 09:30)

Entry Fee: R50 per person, per league event

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
